## Checklist

- [ ] I added the pack ZIP to `community_packs/`.
- [ ] I added the pack entry to `community_packs.json`.
- [ ] The ZIP contains only override files for GMod.
- [ ] The ZIP contains a normal override folder with `models/`, `materials/`, and/or `lua/`.
- [ ] I tested the override in GMod or clearly described what still needs testing.
